nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: Welcome to Faerie Glade, heart of our hidden grove. Even the stream has carried word of your arrival.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: The Windward Seal is a sacred token. I cannot grant it while the Fount of All Water runs choked beneath our roots.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: Speak with our Chief Water Engineer near the entrance of the the Fount. She can unseal the depths to the west. I fear the blight is stirred by the dragon at the world's center.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: The waters run clear once more! You have our eternal gratitude. As promised, here is the Windward Seal.
May root, wind, and water guide you.
